purpose: Pure localStorage queue for inbound MLS Welcome invitations awaiting explicit user accept/decline. Enforces global cap (256) and per-inviter cap (8) to prevent flooding.

public_api.name: PendingInvitation
public_api.signature: type PendingInvitation = { id: string; inviterPubkeyHex: string; receivedAt: number; welcomeEventJson: string }
public_api.description: Serialised pending invitation stored in localStorage

public_api.name: listPendingInvitations
public_api.description: Read all pending invitations from localStorage

public_api.name: enqueuePendingInvitation
public_api.description: Add invitation to queue; enforces global 256 cap and per-inviter 8 cap

public_api.name: countPendingInvitations
public_api.description: Return total count of pending invitations

public_api.name: pendingInvitationsForInviter
public_api.description: Count pending invitations from a specific inviter

external_ports: InvitationActions seam — acceptPendingInvitation / declinePendingInvitation exported from welcomeSubscription.ts, wired via MarmotContext
test_targets: enqueuePendingInvitation: global cap 256, per-inviter cap 8, idempotent re-add
welcomeSubscription: NIP-59 validation runs BEFORE enqueuePendingInvitation
acceptPendingInvitation: calls joinGroupFromWelcome, removes from queue on success and failure
declinePendingInvitation: removes from queue, no joinGroupFromWelcome call
